scripts.qa: pnpm qa:copy && pnpm qa:config && pnpm qa:seo
scripts.verify:autonomous: pnpm --filter @emdash/model-runtime build && pnpm --filter @emdash/model-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @emdash/autoresearch-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @emdash/content-evals typecheck && pnpm --filter @emdash/content-policy typecheck && pnpm --filter @emdash/ai typecheck
scripts.verify:blog: pnpm --filter @emdash/blog check && pnpm --filter @emdash/blog build && pnpm sync:guide-seo
scripts.verify: pnpm verify:skills && pnpm verify:autonomous && pnpm verify:blog && pnpm qa
scripts.clean: pnpm -r run clean && rm -rf node_modules .astro dist
